questions.text: An [mm] PR with a proposed mental-model update was opened for this PR — review and decide on it (merge or close), then comment /mm-answer mm-pr: <decided> to continue.

rationale: PR #14 replaces the old first-N log_rate_limit/LogRateLimiter with a unified random LogSampler, three request/access/diagnostic sample-rate flags, structured worker-to-client LogSampleConfigPb propagation, and lazy access-recorder facades that skip sampled-out field materialization.
